2026-04-16T21:38:55.1787828Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-16T21:38:55.1788365Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-16T21:38:55.1788979Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-16T21:38:55.1789354Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-16T21:38:55.1789673Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-16T21:38:55.1789914Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-16T21:38:55.1790080Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-16T21:38:55.1790274Z [36;1m[0m

2026-04-16T21:38:55.1790685Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-16T21:38:55.1791182Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-16T21:38:55.1791441Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-16T21:41:15.9982110Z   
2026-04-16T21:41:15.9982267Z   Given that:
2026-04-16T21:41:15.9982546Z   1. This is an automated bot commit for a TypeSpec version bump
2026-04-16T21:41:15.9982997Z   2. There's only 1 commit in the shallow clone (no diff to compare against)
2026-04-16T21:41:15.9983337Z   
2026-04-16T21:41:15.9983494Z   
2026-04-16T21:41:15.9983931Z   3. The changed files span 115K+ files across all packages with existing READMEs, CHANGELOGs, and samples
2026-04-16T21:41:15.9984581Z   
2026-04-16T21:41:15.9985784Z   I think the right answer here is noop - there's no clear documentation gap from a versioning/regeneration bump commit. CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 1 issue(s) can be created.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"Detailed issue description in Markdown. Labels must exist in the repository.","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"parent":{"description":"Parent issue number for creating sub-issues. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created. This is distinct from noop (no action needed) — it indicates an active failure that prevented the task from running. 2026-04-16T21:41:16.2442369Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-04-16T21:41:16.2442575Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-04-16T21:41:16.2442913Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-04-16T21:41:16.2443021Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-04-16T21:41:16.2443164Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-04-16T21:41:16.2443239Z [36;1melse[0m

2026-04-16T21:41:16.2443643Z [36;1mfi[0m
